text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper is real and published in *Radiology: Artificial Intelligence* (2022), but the cited author list is substantially fabricated. The actual authors are Xueyan Mei, Zelong Liu, Philip M. Robson, Brett Marinelli, Mingqian Huang, Amish Doshi, Adam Jacobi, Chendi Cao, Katherine E. Link, Thomas Yang, Ying Wang, Hayit Greenspan, Timothy Deyer, Zahi A. Fayad, and Yang Yang (15 authors), whereas the cited reference lists 12 different names with wrong first names (e.g., "Xuefeng Mei," "Zhongyi Liu," "Benjamin Marinelli," "Michael Huang") and omits three real authors entirely — a classic "grafted reference" hallucination.
LINK: https://pubs.rsna.org/doi/full/10.1148/ryai.210315
